ELPAC Level 1

DTR  |  Listen to a Classroom Conversation
LCC-MS8-L1-300650-MSSCI8-MCF-IFN-01 | MSSCI8 | Waves | MCF | IFN

The Cedar Drum Case

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What are the students trying to figure out?
2QUESTION 2: What does the girl say about the wood sides of the drum?
3QUESTION 3: Based on the conversation, what would the students probably tell their class?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Listen again. Find the part where they say what they are trying to figure out. Find the part where the girl explains what the wood does to sound.
CA ELD: PI.A.1, PI.A.3, PI.B.5  |  NGSS MS-PS4-2  |  MS8 Science — Waves
